summary.p: Both stations made every exertion to restore communication by alternately sending and putting in instruments to receive. Nothing more was read at Valentia, and not one word in Newfoundland during the whole day.

details.p: It is proper to state, however, that from 6.40 A.M. until 9.08 P.M., operations at Valentia prevented the possibility of transmission or reception.

timeline.event: Mr. Canning was engaged in lifting the cable in the harbor.
